summary: Pick the chronologically earliest material 8-K after each insider sale, not the most recent.
reason: ListEdgarFilings returns rows ORDER BY filed_at DESC; the original forward-iterate-and-break matched the latest material 8-K in the 90-day window, contradicting the command's documented semantics. Loop now iterates ascending via a new findEarliestMaterial8K helper covered by insider_followthrough_test.go.
validated_outcome: insider_followthrough_test.go::TestFindEarliestMaterial8K_PicksChronologicallyFirst exercises a DESC-sorted set with three material 8-Ks and asserts the earliest is selected.
